DP.425.0000:
Howdy, traveler!\f
Some of our customers are rowdy
types that want to battle.\f
But pay it no mind and stay a while.
DP.425.0001:
How are ya doing?
Whatcha having?\f
’Course, all we ever have is
Moomoo Milk.\f
Moomoo Milk, $500.
Want a bottle?
DP.425.0004:
Oh!
You don’t have the money, sweetie.
DP.425.0005:
All right, then.\f
I should tell you, it’s not that we
can only get Moomoo Milk. No.\f
We choose to serve only Moomoo Milk.
We’re very particular about it.
DP.425.0006:
Youngster, you’ve seen the
PSYDUCK huddled outside?\f
PSYDUCK are Pokémon that suffer from
chronic headaches...\f
I’m afraid we’ll have to wait for them
to get better.
DP.425.0007:
Well, well! So I hear you’ve relieved
the PSYDUCK of their headaches.\f
The person who gave you the
SecretPotion must be quite the Trainer!
